compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create end-to-end behavioral test with regression assertions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh — comprehensive structural boundary test confirming all mechanisms are present across all modified files. Include regression assertions verifying existing content is preserved (original Part B probes, original 6 red-team categories, original Part C trigger).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test checks Part B probe, Part C trigger, red team category, blue team recognition, orchestrator handling, SC revision logic
  Verify: grep -c 'PASS\|assert\|test_' tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Test includes regression assertions for preserved existing content
  Verify: grep -q 'sync loops\|race conditions\|original.*categor' tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh
- [ ] Test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-residual-state-e2e.sh
